description_long: This is a disposable beverage cup with a conical shape, featuring a vibrant blue exterior and a white plastic lid. The lid is fitted with a white bendable straw that protrudes at an angle, typical of fast-food or takeout drink containers. On one side of the cup, there is a large, stylized red, white, and blue logo with the word 'bepis' in lowercase, mimicking popular soda branding. The cup appears to be made primarily of coated paper or thin plastic, with the lid and straw constructed from lightweight plastic. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light subtly. This type of cup is commonly found in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, and near food vendors.
description: A blue disposable drink cup with a white lid and straw, featuring a bold 'bepis' logo. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of fast-food beverage containers.
description_view_0: The cup is seen from a slight angle, showing the blue body, white lid, and straw, with no visible logo.
description_view_1: The cup is viewed directly from the front, with the straw centered and the blue body and white lid visible, but the logo is not in view.
description_view_2: This view highlights the 'bepis' logo and text on the blue cup, with the white lid and angled straw clearly visible.
description_view_3: The cup is seen from the opposite side of the logo, with only a partial glimpse of the logo and text, and the straw is viewed end-on.
